howItWorks.intro: This paint mixing ratio calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Ratio
rules.explanation: Proportional mixing based on desired percentages.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: Can I mix different paint brands?
faq.a: Same-type paints (latex with latex) can be mixed. Avoid mixing oil and water-based.

faq.q: How to test a custom color?
faq.a: Always mix a small test batch first and let it dry completely before committing.
